description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI: TCMalloc test that runs on push to master and main branches, on pull request open and synchronize, and on merge group checks requested, as well as on workflow dispatch with an optional debug input. The workflow checks for changed files using a reusable workflow, then tests with TCMalloc on an ubuntu-24.04 environment if code changes are detected or if the workflow is dispatched. The job checks out the repository, sets up Bazel and Python with caching, installs qsim requirements and google-perftools, and runs C++ tests with optional debugging.
